aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic level of AEO readiness with some critical gaps in local SEO and content optimization.
quick_wins: Implement a review generation strategy to build Google reviews and improve local SEO.
Optimize website content with targeted keywords for better search visibility.
Enhance the website's metadata and headings to align with SEO best practices.

gbp_analysis.found: The business has NAP consistency on the website but lacks structured citations across directories.
gbp_analysis.summary: The business has a Good Business Profile (GBP) foundation but needs to improve local citations and reviews.
critical_issues: No Google reviews, which impacts local search ranking and trust.
Lack of structured citations on major directories like Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is present on the website but is not validated across major directories.
action_items: Audit and update NAP information on major directories such as Yelp, Bing, and Apple Maps.
Use a local listing service to manage and monitor NAP consistency across platforms.

schema_gaps: No Organization schema beyond basic JSON-LD and Microdata.
Missing Service schema for detailed service listings.
No Review schema to highlight customer testimonials and ratings.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and local citations.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for local AC repair services on Google Maps and local search results.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and updating local directory listings.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, localized content that targets Arlington, TX, and surrounding areas to improve search rankings.
